artifacts.title: Love receipt from 2024-02-22
artifacts.excerpt:
in my healthiest relationships, i feel a gentle yearning to be close, the way a plant slowly leans towards sunlight.

there is no grasping, binging, desperate longing. instead, a calm connection, a steadfast desire for really and truly alive moments of seeing and being seen.

planets.name: Don

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2024-01-05
artifacts.excerpt:
Last night I told my 7 yr old that something was “too complicated to explain”

and she just went really still and quiet, staring off at nothing before saying

“I don’t care.”
“You don’t care about what?”
“That it’s too complicated to explain. Explain it to me.”

😳🥹✨

YES. I was thinking about this after yet another person said “omg your husband is great, can i marry him?”

And I’m like… LISTEN… he did not come ready-made this way. We cultivated this relationship over time and it has been fucking hard.

We would not even be together if my https://t.co/4xjAgn6y4Q

artifacts.title: Time receipt from 2024-01-24
artifacts.excerpt:
i had this colleague who, if i were considering putting off a hard conversation, would say, “that ain’t gonna smell better in a week.”

like it’s food that will spoil over time

and now every time i wanna put off a hard convo, i think of it like food that will stink up my life.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: time, first, every, now.

artifacts.title: Time receipt from 2024-01-09
artifacts.excerpt:
Last night, my kiddo made a pronouncement.

“Mommy has been my favorite for years, so I am switching to daddy.”

Then, directly to me:

“I used to spend hours and hours with you, but instead I’m gonna be spending time with THIS GUY.” *points her thumb at him*

artifacts.title: Time receipt from 2024-05-20
artifacts.excerpt:
a few months after my mom passed (18 months later) HE broke up with ME.

and it wasn’t contentious, just a recognition that our lives were not going in the same direction and with all we had been through there had been no time to evaluate

Turns out that was HIS pattern ☺️
